bids.reasoning: At the opening with no opponent offers or messages yet, I am targeting my maximum utility bid. Since there is no time pressure at t=0.0, I should start firm on my preferred values across all issues and wait for the opponent’s response.

At t=0.02 it is still very early, so I am targeting a very high-utility bid while making a small concession to avoid simply repeating my opening offer. The opponent’s only offer was all valueA, which is the lowest utility for me on every issue and does not yet show meaningful concession, so I will hold firm especially on the high-weight issues D and E.

I am targeting a very high-utility bid because it is still very early at t=0.04, and the opponent has only made a small concession from all valueA to issueE:valueB. Their offers are improving slightly for me but remain far below my prior offers, so I will concede only on low-weight issues while holding firm on the important issueD and issueE.

I targeted a high-utility bid around 0.94 because it is still very early (t=0.06), so there is no need to make major concessions yet. The opponent’s offers remain very low for my utility and show only small, inconsistent movement, so I am conceding mainly on my lowest-weight issues while holding firm on issueC, issueD, and issueE.

I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.92 because it is still very early in the negotiation, so there is little need to make major concessions yet. The opponent’s offers remain low for me, though they have slightly improved on issueE, issueC, and most recently issueD; I will concede mainly on low-weight issueA while holding firm on high-weight issueD and issueE.

I am targeting about 0.90 utility, since it is still very early and the opponent’s offers remain low for me despite some movement on issueD and issueE. I am conceding only on lower-weight issueB while holding the high-weight issues issueC, issueD, and issueE at my best values; the opponent has shown limited concession but not enough to justify dropping major issues yet.

At t=0.12 it is still early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.88 rather than making major concessions. The opponent’s offers remain very low for me, though they have occasionally improved on issueC/issueD/issueE; since they consistently propose valueA on issueA and issueB, I concede first on the low-weight issueA while holding my high-weight issues C/D/E at valueE.

I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.86 because it is still early at t=0.14, so there is no need to make large concessions yet. The opponent has mostly offered very low-utility bids to me, though their latest offer concedes issueD to my best value, so I will hold firm on high-weight issueC/issueD/issueE while conceding further on low-weight issueA/issueB.

I am targeting a high utility around 0.84 because it is still early at t=0.16, so I should not concede much on the important issues C, D, and E. The opponent’s offers remain low for my utility and inconsistent, but they repeatedly place issueA and issueB at valueA, so I am conceding those low-weight issues while holding firm on my highest-weight issues.

At t=0.18 it is still early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid while making concessions mainly on the low-weight issues A and B. The opponent’s latest valid offer improved substantially on issueE and slightly on A/B, but still keeps issueC and issueD low, so I will hold firm on the higher-weight issues C, D, and E for now while avoiding repeating my previous exact bid.

At t=0.20 it is still early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid for me around 0.88 rather than making large concessions on the high-weight issues C, D, and E. The opponent’s offers remain low for me and inconsistent, though they have occasionally moved on issueB/issueE, so I concede mainly on lower-weight issueA and issueB while holding firm on my most important issues.

I am targeting a still-high utility around 0.86 because it is early in the negotiation (t=0.22), so there is no need to concede heavily yet. The opponent has made some movement on high-importance issueD and occasionally issueE, while mostly keeping low values elsewhere, so I am conceding on the lower-weight issues A and B while holding firm on C/D/E.

I am targeting a high utility around 0.88 because it is still early at t=0.24, so there is no need for major concessions yet. The opponent’s offers remain low-value to me and inconsistent, but their latest bid signals possible flexibility on issueA and issueB, which are my lowest-weight issues, so I concede there while holding firm on issueC, issueD, and issueE.

I am targeting a still-strong utility around 0.82 because it is only t=0.26, so there is no need to make a large late-stage concession yet. The opponent’s latest offer is their best so far for me, especially on issueD, but they still keep issueC very low; I will concede mainly on lower-weight issueA/issueB and slightly on issueC while holding firm on high-weight issueD and issueE.

At t=0.28 I am still targeting a strong utility around 0.84, conceding mainly on lower-weight issues and a little on issueC while holding firm on the high-weight issueD and issueE. The opponent’s offers have improved somewhat for me but remain far below my acceptable range, so there is no reason yet to make a large concession; I also avoid repeating my previous exact bid.

I am targeting about 0.80 utility, making a moderate concession because we are still only at t=0.30 but have exchanged many offers. The opponent’s latest offer improved substantially for me on issueE and partly on issueD, while they seem to push issueC low; with no messages to weigh, I will concede on lower-weight issueA/issueB and somewhat on issueC while holding issueD/issueE at my best values.

I am targeting about 0.80 utility: enough concession for t=0.32 while still protecting the highest-weight issues, issueD and issueE. The opponent’s offers have been inconsistent and their latest bid gives valueE on issueB but pulls back strongly on issueD, so I will concede mainly on lower-weight issueA/issueB and keep issueD/issueE at valueE.

I am targeting a utility of about 0.78, still well above reservation while making a meaningful mid-game concession. At t=0.34 there is time left, so I am holding firm on the highest-weight issueD while conceding issueE to valueD and matching the opponent’s recent signal on issueB=valueE. The opponent has not steadily conceded overall, but their recent offers suggest valueE on issueB and valueD on issueE may be tolerable to them.

I am targeting a still-strong utility around 0.76 while conceding on lower/mid-weight issues, since at t=0.36 there is pressure to explore tradeoffs but not to give up the high-weight issueD/issueE positions unnecessarily. The opponent’s latest valid offer concedes issueB and issueE to valueE, but continues to hold issueA/issueC/issueD low, so I match their movement on issueA and issueC while keeping issueD and issueE high.

At t=0.38 I am targeting a still-strong utility around 0.78 while making a clear mid-game concession on lower-weight issues. The opponent’s recent offers have improved for me, especially on issueE and issueB, but they still ask for low issueD; I will hold firm on issueD and issueE because they are my highest-weight issues while matching their latest concessions on issueA, issueB, and issueC.

I targeted a utility around 0.76, still well above reservation but more conceding than my earlier high-utility bids because we are in the mid-game at t=0.40. The opponent’s latest offers have improved notably on issueB and issueE, so I match them there and on the lower-value issues while holding firm on issueD, which is one of my highest-weight issues.

I am targeting a utility around 0.80, which is appropriate for the mid-game: I can concede on lower-weight issueA and partially on issueC while holding firm on the high-weight issueD and issueE. The opponent’s recent valid offers show willingness to give valueE on issueB and issueE, but they continue pushing issueD low, so I will accept their signals on B/C/E while keeping issueD at my top value.

I am targeting a still-strong utility of about 0.74, since we are in the midgame at t=0.44 and should make a meaningful but not excessive concession. The opponent’s recent valid offers have improved for me, especially by offering issueB: valueE and issueE: valueE, so I keep those while compromising on issueD and issueC rather than repeating my previous bid exactly.

I am targeting a utility of about 0.78, which is still strong for me but reflects mid-game concessions at t=0.46. The opponent has repeatedly shown willingness to give issueB=valueE and issueE=valueE, and their latest offer included issueC=valueC, so I incorporate those signals while holding issueD at valueD because it is one of my highest-weight issues. I concede issueA fully since it is low weight for me and the opponent has consistently pushed it low.

I am targeting a utility around 0.76, conceding on the lower-weight issueB while preserving stronger positions on high-weight issueD and issueE. At t=0.48 there is some pressure to move, but it is not yet late enough to accept the opponent’s full last bid; their recent offers have improved to about 0.70 utility for me, suggesting movement toward agreement. There are no opponent messages to weigh, so I rely only on the valid offer history.

At t=0.50 I am targeting about 0.76 utility, since it is mid-game and the opponent’s latest offer already gives me roughly 0.70 but asks me to concede too much on the high-weight issueD. The opponent has gradually moved toward better values for me, especially on issueE and sometimes issueB/C, so I will largely accept their latest structure while holding issueD one step higher.

At t=0.52 I am targeting a solid mid-game utility around 0.80 while making a meaningful concession on the high-weight issueD. The opponent’s recent bids show willingness to offer valueE on issueB and issueC, and they have previously offered valueC on issueD and valueE on issueE, so this bid combines values they have signaled with protection of my most important issueE.

At t=0.54 I am targeting a moderate mid-game utility around 0.76, conceding on lower-weight issueB while preserving valueE on the most important issueE and asking for valueD on high-weight issueD. The opponent’s latest valid offer is worth about 0.70 to me and signals willingness on issueE, issueC, and issueA, so this counter stays close to their structure while improving the most valuable remaining gap for me. There are no opponent messages to weigh.

I am targeting a strong but realistic utility around 0.82 by holding firm on the high-weight issues issueD and issueE while conceding issueB and partially conceding issueC. At t=0.56 there is some time pressure but not enough to immediately drop to the opponent’s exact last offer; their latest bid shows meaningful movement on issueD and issueE, so I will build on that while asking for a modest improvement on issueC.

I am targeting about 0.82 utility, which is still strong for me but shows movement at t=0.58 by conceding issueD from valueE to valueD while keeping the very important issueE at valueE. The opponent has recently shown willingness to offer me issueA=valueE and issueC=valueD, and has often offered issueE=valueE before, so I am incorporating those signals while not overreacting to their low-value issueD/issueE in the latest bid.

I am targeting about 0.78 utility, conceding on the lower-weight issueB and accepting the opponent’s recent positions on issueA, issueC, and issueD while holding firm on high-weight issueE. At t=0.60 there is meaningful time pressure but not yet a deadline scramble, and the opponent has repeatedly signaled willingness to offer valueE on issueE in prior bids, so this is a reasonable compromise. No natural-language messages were provided, so I rely only on the bid history.

I am targeting a solid utility around 0.74 by holding firm on the most important issueE and keeping issueC/issueB favorable, while conceding substantially on issueD where the opponent’s latest bid stayed very low. At t=0.62 there is meaningful time pressure, so I should move closer to the opponent’s signaled preferences without dropping to their exact offer; their recent offers show willingness to give me issueB, issueC, and issueE, but resistance on issueD and issueA.

I am targeting a high utility bid of about 0.86, which is strong for me while also matching the opponent’s latest valid offer. At t=0.64 there is meaningful time pressure, and the opponent has recently conceded substantially on my high-weight issues D and E, so accepting their signaled bid is preferable to risking deadlock.
